Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> Please note that this patch is under track of EX-5113, not EX-5176.
> I do not think we should add EX-5716 here.

EX-5176 changed the data format of trusted.pin. Only EX-5113 may not be recognized by lpcc_purge as expected.

parents.subject: LU-10499 sec: support of PCC-RO for encrypted files

commit.subject: LU-10499 utils: add pcc pin/unpin commands
commit.message:
LU-10499 utils: add pcc pin/unpin commands

Store pin information in xattr trusted.pin.
Add lfs pcc pin/unpin commands to set/clear pcc pin flag.
A pcc-pinned file will not be removed from local storage
cache by lpcc_purge automatically.

Examples of xattr trusted.pin:
trusted.pin=[hsm: 2]
trusted.pin=[hsm: 2,hsm: 3]

EX-bug-id: EX-5113
Change-Id: I17ddf5ac8dc4eae48c0f6bdd0f2a19240474b0f5
Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-pcc
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54460
